title: angraecum angustum
intro: Angraecum angustum, also known as the narrow-lipped star orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Angraecum angustum include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Angraecum angustum are typically made by boiling the plant's roots and leaves in water, which can then be used as a tea or infusion to harness its medicinal properties.
